# Sales Tax Pricing Index

> A sourced comparison of pricing for every major sales tax compliance platform serving US ecommerce and SaaS businesses. Eight providers tracked: Anrok, Avalara, Kintsugi, Numeral, Sphere, TaxCloud, TaxJar, and Zamp.

## Publisher

The Sales Tax Pricing Index is operated by TaxCloud, Inc. (taxcloud.com), one of the eight providers compared. Ownership is disclosed at the bottom of every page and at /methodology#ownership. Despite the publisher relationship, the site is built and maintained as a sourced public reference. Every price is sourced from public vendor pricing pages, vendor help-center articles, public buyer-review platforms (G2, TrustRadius, Shopify App Store), or third-party aggregators (Vendr, checkthat.ai). No price is invented. Quote-only vendors are surfaced as ranges from public buyer reports, not point estimates.

## Editorial methodology

- Every dollar figure traces to a public, dated source. Confidence ratings (A/B/C/D/E) are attached to each price point.
- Opaque vendors (Avalara, Zamp) are shown as ranges from aggregator buyer data, not point estimates. "Quote required" stays "quote required."
- The calculator runs the same pricing math used to populate per-provider pages, with no separate logic.
- TaxCloud's pricing is sourced first-party (we publish full plan, order-tier, and filings-tier ladders); other providers are sourced from their own public materials wherever possible.
- Buyer-observation sections cite only public, non-TaxCloud sources. TaxCloud's internal sales-call data is not used as a source for public claims.

## Key URLs

- Home: https://salestaxpricingindex.org/
- Methodology: https://salestaxpricingindex.org/methodology
- Calculator: https://salestaxpricingindex.org/calculator (ranks all 8 providers by what they'd cost for a given business profile)
- Changelog: https://salestaxpricingindex.org/changelog

## Provider pages

- TaxCloud: /taxcloud-pricing
- TaxJar: /taxjar-pricing
- Avalara: /avalara-pricing
- Numeral: /numeral-pricing
- Kintsugi: /kintsugi-pricing
- Anrok: /anrok-pricing
- Sphere: /sphere-pricing
- Zamp: /zamp-pricing

## Comparison pages

All 28 pairwise comparisons exist at /{a}-vs-{b}-pricing. Examples:
- /taxcloud-vs-avalara-pricing
- /numeral-vs-taxcloud-pricing
- /avalara-vs-taxjar-pricing

## Key structural claims

- Of the eight providers tracked, TaxCloud and Avalara are the only Streamlined Sales Tax (SST) Certified Service Providers. CSP status is a regulatory designation by the SST Governing Board; vendors cannot self-claim it. CSP-certified vendors provide free filing services in the 24 SST member states for sellers with economic-nexus-only presence (no physical nexus).
- The other six providers (TaxJar, Numeral, Kintsugi, Anrok, Sphere, Zamp) are not SST CSPs and bill standard per-filing rates in SST states.
- Pricing models on the site fall into four buckets: tiered subscription (TaxCloud, TaxJar, Avalara), per-filing usage-based (Numeral, Kintsugi), basis-points on taxable revenue (Anrok, Sphere), and quote-only flat-fee bundles (Zamp).

## What this site is and isn't

Is: a sourced comparison surface with public price citations, a free calculator, and per-provider transparency ratings.

Isn't: a paid review site, an affiliate-driven directory, or a TaxCloud marketing landing page. There are no affiliate links, no embedded vendor CTAs, and no demo-booking forms.

## Date

Content is refreshed on a rolling basis. Every page displays a "Last updated" timestamp. The most recent provider-level verifications are tracked in /changelog.
